# BuyVEQT — The VEQT Investor Community Hub

> BuyVEQT (buyveqt.com) is a community-built informational resource for Canadian passive investors interested in the Vanguard All-Equity ETF Portfolio (VEQT.TO). The site provides live market data, fund comparisons, investment calculators, distribution history, and educational articles. It is not affiliated with Vanguard Investments Canada Inc.

## Key Facts About VEQT

- **Full name**: Vanguard All-Equity ETF Portfolio
- **Ticker**: VEQT.TO (Toronto Stock Exchange)
- **MER**: ~0.20% (management fee reduced to 0.17% in Nov 2025; official MER pending fiscal year-end recalculation)
- **AUM**: ~$11.2B CAD
- **Holdings**: ~13,700 stocks across ~50 countries
- **Inception**: January 29, 2019
- **Distribution frequency**: Annual (late December)
- **Asset allocation**: 100% equity (no bonds)
- **Structure**: Fund of funds — holds 4 underlying Vanguard ETFs

## Underlying ETFs

| ETF | Region | Weight | MER |
|-----|--------|--------|-----|
| VUN | US Total Market | ~40% | 0.16% |
| VCN | Canada All Cap | ~30% | 0.05% |
| VIU | International Developed | ~23% | 0.22% |
| VEE | Emerging Markets | ~7% | 0.24% |

## Site Content

### Live Data
- Current VEQT price and daily change: https://buyveqt.com/today
- Performance snapshot (1D, 1W, 1M, 3M, YTD, 1Y, since inception): https://buyveqt.com/today

### Comparisons
- VEQT vs XEQT: https://buyveqt.com/compare/veqt-vs-xeqt
- VEQT vs VGRO: https://buyveqt.com/compare/veqt-vs-vgro
- VEQT vs ZEQT: https://buyveqt.com/compare/veqt-vs-zeqt
- Multi-fund comparison tool: https://buyveqt.com/compare

### Calculators
- Historical return calculator ("If You Invested"): https://buyveqt.com/invest
- DCA, dividend income, TFSA/RRSP calculators: https://buyveqt.com/calculators

### Distributions
- Full distribution history since 2019: https://buyveqt.com/distributions
- Income estimator: https://buyveqt.com/distributions

### Educational Articles
- What Is VEQT: https://buyveqt.com/learn/what-is-veqt

- VEQT in TFSA vs RRSP vs Taxable: https://buyveqt.com/learn/veqt-tfsa-rrsp-taxable
- VEQT's MER True Cost Over 30 Years: https://buyveqt.com/learn/veqt-mer-true-cost
- VEQT vs DIY 4-ETF Portfolio: https://buyveqt.com/learn/veqt-vs-diy-portfolio
- Why Your VEQT Is Down: https://buyveqt.com/learn/veqt-is-down
- What You Actually Own: https://buyveqt.com/learn/what-you-actually-own
- How VEQT Rebalances: https://buyveqt.com/learn/how-veqt-rebalances
- VEQT vs XEQT article: https://buyveqt.com/learn/veqt-vs-xeqt
- VEQT vs VGRO article: https://buyveqt.com/learn/veqt-vs-vgro

### Fund Holdings Breakdown
- Inside VEQT (geographic, sector, top holdings): https://buyveqt.com/inside-veqt

- Data sources and methodology: https://buyveqt.com/methodology
